name: Scenario Planning
what_it_is: Making decisions robust across multiple plausible futures rather than optimizing for a single predicted outcome.
core_mechanic: Identify 2 most uncertain and most impactful variables. Create 2x2 from extremes. Describe each quadrant as a vivid future. Best decision performs adequately across all four, not brilliantly in one.
when_to_use: High uncertainty environment / Long time horizon decisions / Strategic decisions where betting on one future is too risky
when_not_to_use: Short-term operational decisions / Key variables are actually predictable / Need a single clear answer fast
ideaos_application: Agent 3 identifies the 2 most uncertain variables, builds the 2x2, describes each scenario in 2 sentences, rates the proposed direction in each quadrant. Produces a regret minimization recommendation.
